scripts.dev: npm run build:dev && APP_MODE=dev node backend/dist/index.js
scripts.cloud:start: gcloud run deploy birthday-game --image europe-west1-docker.pkg.dev/birthday-game-2026/birthday-game/birthday-game:latest --region europe-west1 --project birthday-game-2026 --allow-unauthenticated --timeout 3600 --max-instances 1 --min-instances 1
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
scripts.build:offline: npm run build:shared && npm run build:offline -w @birthday/frontend
scripts.build:dev: npm run build:shared && npm run build:dev-tools -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
